text: Surrounded by the hum of intellect and collective focus in the first scene, I feel both the comfort and the pressure of shared learning. The second space draws me into a more abstract realm, where confusion and experimentation are not only accepted but celebrated. I am reminded of the fluid space between knowing and wondering—a place where meaning is assembled only after the fact. Here, I feel a sense of philosophical playfulness, alive to the possibility that learning and understanding are perpetual works in progress.
